recommendations.title: The Reluctant Fundamentalist
recommendations.overview: In New York, a Pakistani native finds that his American Dream has collapsed in the wake of the 9/11 terrorist attacks.

recommendations.title: Queen of Katwe
recommendations.overview: A young girl overcomes her disadvantaged upbringing in the slums of Uganda to become a Chess master.

recommendations.title: Amelia
recommendations.overview: A look at the life of legendary American pilot Amelia Earhart, who disappeared while flying over the Pacific Ocean in 1937 in an attempt to make a flight around the world.

recommendations.title: Monsoon Wedding
recommendations.overview: A stressed father, a bride-to-be with a secret, a smitten event planner, and relatives from around the world create much ado about the preparations for an arranged marriage in India.

recommendations.title: Vanity Fair
recommendations.overview: In early 19th century England, orphaned Becky Sharp defies her poverty-stricken background and ascends the social ladder alongside her best friend.

recommendations.title: Salaam Bombay!

recommendations.title: Kama Sutra: A Tale of Love
recommendations.overview: Tara and Maya are inseparable, with the same tastes, habits, and hobbies. Years later, the two have matured but have maintained their friendship. Tara marries local prince Raj Singh, who succeeds the throne as the sole heir. After the marriage, Raj s

recommendations.title: September 11
recommendations.overview: An anthology of short films inspired by the events of the September 11 World Trade Center attacks.
recommendations.director: Ken Loach, Shōhei Imamura, Samira Makhmalbaf, Idrissa Ouedraogo, Alejandro González Iñárritu, Claude Lelouch, Amos Gitai, Sean Penn, Danis Tanović, Youssef Chahine, Mira Nair

recommendations.title: New York, I Love You
recommendations.overview: New York, I Love You delves into the intimate lives of New Yorkers as they grapple with, delight in and search for love. Journey from the Diamond District in the heart of Manhattan, through Chinatown and the Upper East Side, towards the Village, into
recommendations.director: Natalie Portman, Shekhar Kapur, Mira Nair, Fatih Akin, Yvan Attal, Jiang Wen, Shunji Iwai, Allen Hughes, Joshua Marston, Brett Ratner, Randall Balsmeyer

recommendations.title: Jiro Dreams of Sushi
recommendations.overview: Revered sushi chef Jiro Ono strives for perfection in his work, while his eldest son, Yoshikazu, has trouble living up to his father's legacy.
